verse.name: v1
verse.lines: At times I feel alone, Living on my own, And peace of mind is very hard to find; But when I call on You, a Friend who's always true, You comfort me and lead my cares behind.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, draw me nearer to Your side, In Your Presence may I humbly hide; And grant me strength to face the coming day, In all Your grace just yield me to Your way; And draw me close to Thee.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: At times I've been deceived I could feel His Spirit leave, And I fall down on my knees to God and pray; Lord lift me out from sin, let Your Spirit reign within, And most of all just draw me close to Thee.
